Name Indexer

Please sideload your add-in to see the app.

Preview

    Settings

    Words to skip — comma or newline separated

    Auto-updated when word count changes

    Unicode-escaped, comma-separated

    Optional — controls how the surname is normalized before indexing

    JSON array of {"pattern","replacement","flags"?}. Applied to surname, in order.

    Min – max words per name (auto-updates pattern)

    to
